Property.Name: BodyScript
Property.Value: ( SELECT CAST(NULL AS decimal(4,3)) AS Ca, CAST(NULL AS decimal(4,3)) AS Ma, CAST(NULL AS decimal(4,3)) AS Ni, CAST(NULL AS decimal(4,3)) AS Zn, CAST(NULL AS decimal(4,3)) AS Al, CAST(NULL AS decimal(4,3)) AS Fe, CAST(NULL AS decimal(4,3)) AS Cr, CAST(NULL AS decimal(4,3)) AS Cu, CAST(NULL AS decimal(4,3)) AS Na, CAST(NULL AS decimal(4,3)) AS K WHERE 1 = 0 )

Property.Name: HeaderContents
Property.Value: CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[fctn_MetalsSample](@PickTicket nvarchar(15)) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN
